title: GoodFellas
tmdbOverview: The true story of Henry Hill, a half-Irish, half-Sicilian Brooklyn kid who is adopted by neighbourhood gangsters at an early age and climbs the ranks of a Mafia family under the guidance of Jimmy Conway.
synopsis: GoodFellas (1990) is a drama and crime film from United States. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.7 on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
